---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 
```{r message=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(ggpubr)
library(superheat)
library(fs)
```
## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

```

```{r message=FALSE}
csv_list<- list.files(Path_1,
                      pattern = "(C1C2.*)csv$",
                     recursive = TRUE,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = T)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file

df_list<- list()

for (n in 1:length(csv_list)) 
{
  df_list[[n]] <- readr::read_delim(csv_list[n], ",", escape_double = FALSE, col_names = T, trim_ws = TRUE)
  df_list[[n]] <- df_list[[n]] %>% as.data.frame()
 
}

names(df_list)<- csv_list

df_list_GC <- df_list[grep('GC', names(df_list))]
df_list_NT <- df_list[grep('NT', names(df_list))]
df_list_SM <- df_list[grep('soma', names(df_list))]

```


```{r message=FALSE}

df_NT <- df_list_NT %>% reduce(bind_rows)  %>% as.data.frame() 
df_NT$file<- selected_list %>% names() %>% path_file()
df_NT$img<-selected_list %>% names() %>% path_file() %>% gsub("\\_filtered_masked.tif_C1C2.*","", .)
names(df_NT)[2:3] <- c("TOS_linear", "TOS_log2")
df_NT$region<- "NT"

df_GC <- df_list_GC %>% reduce(bind_rows)  %>% as.data.frame() 
df_GC$file<- selected_list %>% names() %>% path_file()
df_GC$img<-selected_list %>% names() %>% path_file() %>% gsub("\\_filtered_masked.tif_C1C2.*","", .)
names(df_GC)[2:3] <- c("TOS_linear", "TOS_log2")
df_GC$region<- "GC"

df_SM <- df_list_SM %>% reduce(bind_rows)  %>% as.data.frame() 
df_SM$file<- selected_list %>% names() %>% path_file()
df_SM$img<-selected_list %>% names() %>% path_file() %>% gsub("\\_filtered_masked.tif_C1C2.*","", .)
names(df_SM)[2:3] <- c("TOS_linear", "TOS_log2")
df_SM$region<- "SM"

df_1 <- rbind(df_NT, df_GC, df_SM)
saveRDS(df_1, file="Actin_Rab11a_Coloc.rds")
```

# import F-actin-Myl and F-actin_Arp3 coloc data and combine with F-actin-Rab11 coloc data
```{r}

df_GC_Myl<- readRDS("GC_coloc.rds")
df_GC_Myl$region <- "GC"

df_GC$pair<- "Actin_Rab11"
df_GC_compare<- rbind(df_GC, df_GC_Myl)

df_soma_Myl<- readRDS("soma_coloc.rds")
df_soma_Myl$region <- "SM"

df_SM$pair<- "Actin_Rab11"
df_SM_compare<- rbind(df_SM, df_soma_Myl)

table(df_GC_compare$pair)
```

```{r}
my_comparisons <- list(c("Arp3_actin", "Actin_Rab11"),c("Arp3_actin", "MLC_actin"), c("Actin_Rab11", "MLC_actin"))

df_SM_compare %>% ggplot(aes(x= pair, y=PCC, fill=pair)) +  
  geom_violin(trim=T,  bw=1, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=0.05)+
  
  #geom_point(aes(fill=pair), position = position_dodge(0.5))+
  geom_jitter(shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.2))+
  #geom_dotplot(binaxis='y', stackdir='center', dotsize=1, binwidth = 0.1)+ 
   geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+ 
   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-1 ,2), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) + 
  
  #stat_summary(fun.data=data_summary)+ 
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, method="wilcox.test")+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 
```



```{r message=FALSE}
df_2 <- df_1 %>%  subset(df_1$M1 < 0.99)
```


```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)

```


```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}

df_summary <- df_1 %>% group_by(region) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats()
```


```{r}

graph_list<- list()

graph_list[[1]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= region, y=PCC, fill=region)) 
graph_list[[2]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x=region, y=SRCC, fill=region)) 
graph_list[[3]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= region, y=ICQ, fill=region))
graph_list[[4]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= region, y=M1, fill=region))
graph_list[[5]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= region, y=M2, fill=region))
graph_list[[6]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= region, y=TOS_linear, fill=region))
graph_list[[7]]<- ggplot(df_1, aes(x= region, y=TOS_log2, fill=region))

```


```{r, fig.width=5, echo=FALSE}
my_comparisons <- list(c("GC", "SM"),c("SM", "NT"), c("NT", "GC"))

graph_list[[1]]+
  geom_violin(trim=F,  bw=1, kernel ="gaussian", adjust=0.05)+
  
  #geom_point(aes(fill=pair), position = position_dodge(0.5))+
  geom_jitter(shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.2))+
  #geom_dotplot(binaxis='y', stackdir='center', dotsize=1, binwidth = 0.1)+ 
   geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")+ 
   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-1 ,1.5), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) + 
  
  #stat_summary(fun.data=data_summary)+ 
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, method="wilcox.test")+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

```


```{r}
ggsave(
  "PCC_GC.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```
